Registry / Terms / automatic checking facility

automatic checking facility

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01373 · 23 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 11 distinct definitions — harmonise.
